hero.title: Find Parking in Seconds Across UAE
hero.description: Find nearby parking, reserve instantly, and pay cashless, all in one seamless app experience.

platform.title:
Your parking, in
your hands.
platform.subtitle:
Smarter parking,
right from your browser.

appFeatures.title: Manage with ease
appFeatures.description: Access your account and manage your parking anytime, anywhere.

appFeatures.title: Track in real time
appFeatures.description: View your parking sessions and history in real time.

appFeatures.title: Go cashless
appFeatures.description: Enjoy fast, secure payments with a seamless experience.

websiteFeatures.title: Simple & intuitive
websiteFeatures.description: A clean, smooth experience designed for quick access and easy navigation.

websiteFeatures.title: Stay in control
websiteFeatures.description: Manage your account, view activity, and monitor your parking in one place.

websiteFeatures.title: Secure & reliable
websiteFeatures.description: Your information is protected with enterprise-grade security.

tabs.label: Public Parking
tabs.description: Drivers can discover nearby public parking, secure a slot, and complete payment without leaving the app.

tabs.label: Private Parking
tabs.description: Property owners can publish bays, control availability, and turn unused inventory into steady revenue.

tabs.label: Valet
tabs.description: Users request valet, track vehicle handoff status, and trigger retrieval at exactly the right time.

tabs.label: EV Charging
tabs.description: EV drivers can find charging-ready spots, begin a session, and settle the payment flow in one place.

screenshots.title: Find nearby parking in seconds
screenshots.description: Start from a clean home view that surfaces nearby zones, live pricing, and the quickest route to an available bay.

screenshots.title: Scan the map before you drive in
screenshots.description: Drivers can compare availability, spot types, and tower locations without bouncing between multiple parking apps.

screenshots.title: Reserve the right bay with clarity
screenshots.description: The booking flow keeps timing, bay details, and vehicle information in one focused screen so the decision feels effortless.

screenshots.title: Complete payment without friction
screenshots.description: A fast payment experience keeps pricing, duration, and confirmations visible while still feeling premium and calm.

screenshots.title: Keep every session and receipt organised
screenshots.description: Past bookings, transaction details, and proof of payment stay easy to revisit whenever users need them again.

currency.title: Pay Instantly. Park Effortlessly. Stay in Control.
currency.subtitle: Smart Parking Flow
currency.description: Fast, cashless parking across the UAE with wallet, Apple Pay, and card options.

featureCards.title:

featureCards.description: Transparent pricing with no hidden charges - what you see is what you pay.

featureCards.title:
Seamless
City Transactions
featureCards.description: Reserve, extend, and pay effortlessly for your parking sessions in one smooth flow.

halapark.title: Next-Gen Parking at Your Fingertips
halapark.subtitle: Find, book, and manage parking easily from your phone. Get real-time availability, quick booking, and a smooth, hassle-free experience anytime, anywhere.
